metadata.name: Audit Quality Control of Corrective Actions

description: A quality auditor reviews the process for implementing corrective actions that result from customer complaints.

nodes.task_description: Select a sample of recent customer complaints that resulted in a Corrective and Preventive Action (CAPA) being created.

expected_outcome.value: A sample of CAPAs is selected.

nodes.task_description: For each sampled CAPA, review the root cause analysis to ensure it was thorough.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor confirms the root cause analysis was well-documented for each sampled CAPA.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the effectiveness of the corrective action was later checked to ensure it actually solved the problem.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor finds that for two of the CAPAs, there was no effectiveness check performed, meaning the company doesn't know if the fix actually worked.
